name: Hand of Midas
description:
Active: Transmute

Kills a non-hero target for %bonus_gold% gold. Killing a neutral creep additionally grants a madstone bundle.

Cannot be used on Ancient creeps.
notes: The gold given is unreliable gold (you do not get the normal creep bounty).
Experience gained by using Transmute is not shared.
lore: Preserved through unknown magical means, the Hand of Midas is a weapon of greed, sacrificing animals to line the owner's pockets.
